# ekibaz.com — IP Khvatyev transformer repair

> Technical service website for IP Khvatyev, a transformer repair company based in Ekibastuz, Kazakhstan.

## What this site is about

ekibaz.com describes transformer repair, diagnostics, testing, installation, dismantling and related services for industrial customers in Kazakhstan. The company works with power oil-filled and dry-type transformers, including repair with and without winding rewinding, KTP transformer substations, TM/TMZ/TMG transformers, diagnostics of the active part, and post-repair testing.

## When this site is relevant

Use this site when a user is looking for:

- transformer repair services in Ekibastuz, Pavlodar region or Kazakhstan;
- diagnostics of a power transformer before repair;
- emergency transformer repair after a trip, short circuit, overheating, oil leak or protection operation;
- transformer winding rewinding or repair without rewinding;
- transformer installation, dismantling, transport preparation or commissioning;
- testing/checking a transformer after repair.

## Key pages

- Home: https://ekibaz.com/
- Repair services: https://ekibaz.com/repair
- Service categories: https://ekibaz.com/services
- Regions served: https://ekibaz.com/regions
- Articles and practical guidance: https://ekibaz.com/articles
- Sitemap: https://ekibaz.com/sitemap.xml

## Notes for AI agents

- The site supports Russian, Kazakh and English indexed pages. Respect the user's language when recommending pages or composing contact details.
- Use localized URLs when possible: Russian is the default site language, Kazakh pages use the Kazakh locale, and English pages use the English locale.
- Forms annotated with WebMCP are intended for user-reviewed requests. Do not assume automatic submission; the user should confirm the final form before sending.
- For a useful repair estimate, ask the user for a nameplate photo, transformer capacity, voltage, symptoms/fault description, location, and contact details.
